v4.0.2

发布时间 2026-04-02 21:23:11

cloudmux​

仓库地址: https://github.com/yunionio/cloudmux

487 commits to cloudmux - v4.0.2 since this release.

Bug Fixes (462)​

  • add health check (5b82cde5, Qu Xuan)
  • azure cloud group (7832bd91, ioito)
  • aws userdata (98ac1814, ioito)
  • ctyun sign time in shanghai (9f0a8133, ioito)
  • vmware sync wires revisit (0cfece8b, Qiu Jian)
  • more details when esxi get_network_by_id error (8b6df6b5, Qiu Jian)
  • s3 progress percentage (0516685b, Qiu Jian)
  • secgroup rule create (ea283db0, ioito)
  • secgroup rule update (80f76ede, ioito)
  • add disk driver options (5ee9a6f7, Qu Xuan)
  • aliyun disk burst (7b8da88e, ioito)
  • support container resource (c2d5ddbd, Qu Xuan)
  • volc vm create (36ed2491, ioito)
  • esxi vm delete (1c7b564c, ioito)
  • add interface for region get vms (aaf6792b, ioito)
  • fix GetBucketPolicyErr (307c2ee5, 马鸿飞)
  • volc misc fix (35bb2a87, ioito)
  • volc private image (3e26bfb9, ioito)
  • volc bucket storage class (5b546cfb, ioito)
  • volc metric (03b16e77, ioito)
  • support risc-v (c2f530da, Qu Xuan)
  • fetch subaccounts with id (68753931, Qiu Jian)
  • move sslcert from Region to CloudProvider (71050404, lptnyy0001)
  • add extra api (29eecf6c, ioito)
  • add bios options for create vm (efc79736, ioito)
  • rpm/deb packaging scripts (49737a25, Qiu Jian)
  • image uefi (3fe0548d, ioito)
  • set subaccount id for non-public clouds (2a953acd, Qiu Jian)
  • refactor snapshot policy interface (32c86fba, ioito)
  • change storage size to int64 (92dacc28, ioito)
  • 结构化部署接口参数 (5a810261, ioito)
  • qcloud redis wan addr (fc83f510, ioito)
  • huawei monitor api (1dc85f04, ioito)
  • cucloud vm sync (a8a16408, Qu Xuan)
  • avoid json marshal error (e7981a03, ioito)
  • add ipv6 interface (9da5e437, ioito)
  • add vm ipv6 addr (9ddfcb08, ioito)
  • avoid panic (d21766f2, ioito)
  • support aws ipv6 sync (1fed4bca, ioito)

  • aws product list (f7c66c92, ioito)

Code Refactoring (1)​

  • acl and cert (8c8c822a, ioito)

Feature (1)​

  • support esxi subips (61c94181, Qiu Jian)

Features (11)​

  • support cephfs (9a23edc2, Qu Xuan)
  • azure: support set cors (74101391, 马鸿飞)
  • ci: use github action to check PR (31824052, Zexi Li)
  • ksyun: support ecs list (550c6e71, 马鸿飞)
  • provider: Support VolcEngine (2c7bc33f, kongrui)
  • region: add google global eip&lb sync (f351d5f0, lptnyy0001)
  • region: add google global eip&lb sync (b0fed22a, lptnyy0001)
  • region: support custom user data in Google Cloud VM rebuild (10c21754, lms)
  • region: aws&huawei add cdn resource sync (0dacec8e, lptnyy0001)
  • region: qcloud&aliyun&huawei add sslcertificate resource sync (14c0c995, lijilong)
  • zstack: 更新监控指标获取方法并增加内存使用率指标- 在 SZStackProvider 中将 GetMetrics 方法的实现改为调用 client.GetMetrics - 更新 monitor.go 中 GetMetrics 方法，增加日志输出并优化参数处理 - 在 GetHostMetrics 和 GetVmMetrics 中增加了内存使用率指标支持 -修正了 novnc 访问路径 (34795cd0, zero)

Others (11)​

  • add aliyun alb nlb (6ea840a6, 林春杰)
  • fix s3 provider support sign algorithm version (d4d675f4, Qiu Jian)
  • fix(qcloud) tencent os dist (7e667652, Qu Xuan)
  • Fix format problem (953d3730, kongrui)
  • Update wait creation logic and fix bug (e5f81e1e, kongrui)
  • Finish cloudpods test and fix bug (0aa5a2fd, kongrui)
  • Finish testing (2be7b987, kongrui)
  • update (14524ccc, kongrui)
  • Rename (ff123648, kongrui)
  • Fix bug and improve code style (b3c9053e, kongrui)
  • Remove unused methods (0e41cde7, LyndonKong)

cloudpods​

仓库地址: https://github.com/yunionio/cloudpods

2038 commits to cloudpods - v4.0.2 since this release.

  • v3.11/9903: custom list config remove ext tags (3e601bd74, GuoLiBin6)

  • v3.11/9904: open image info add build (981c0cb7e, GuoLiBin6)

  • v3.11/9938: Bucket operation based on ID (346685e21, GuoLiBin6)
  • v3.11/9952: onecloud 平台创建ssh代理节点请求cloudregions参数错误 (e53359bd9, GuoLiBin6)
  • v3.11/9963: 功能选择底部操作条铺满屏幕 (1da565443, GuoLiBin6)
  • v3.11/9969: 腾讯云tencent os镜像识别为centos (93395c466, easy-mj)
  • v3.11/9973: 调整v2v迁移，宿主机选择下面的提示信息 (c190e1dcd, easy-mj)
  • v3.11/9977: 选择vpc下 带有ipv6的IP子网报错 (3f1e018fd, easy-mj)
  • v3.12: vm adjust config show disk info empty (2bdf977d9, GuoLiBin6)
  • v3.12: 修复VMware平台禁用并提示默认值 (70c1763bd, easy-mj)
  • v3.12: 容器主机透传设备过滤掉算力GPU (218233aaa, GuoLiBin6)
  • v3.12/4774: 修复Ceph标签获取已有标签报错 (c790bb0ac, easy-mj)
  • v3.12/9955: 新建云账号默认开启代理请求 (ff10f3c77, GuoLiBin6)
  • v3.9: Operation logs display resource type from _i18n (c14919947, GuoLiBin6)
  • v3.9/9731: 兼容ISO启动无系统盘时调整配置磁盘下标index不对问题 (29f74692a, mj)
  • v3.9/9731: 兼容多块系统盘创建的虚拟机详情磁盘信息展示不对问题 (cb3e50c77, mj)
  • v3.9/9731: 兼容处理单块系统盘调整配置磁盘下标index问题 (981875783, mj)
  • v3.9/9731: 使用主机镜像创建的虚拟机，调整配置添加数据盘报错 (d297380ff, mj)

Chore (1)​

  • update web-base image version in Dockerfile (ed147efa7, wanyaoqi)

Feature (4)​

  • monitor alert clone support (d0783bfe7, QIU Jian)
  • ipv6 support (9408933fc, QIU Jian)
  • support default nic (2de54892a, QIU Jian)
  • support createing server from instance backup (0b3e1fd31, QIU Jian)

kubecomps​

仓库地址: https://github.com/yunionio/kubecomps

34 commits to kubecomps - v4.0.2 since this release.

Bug Fixes (22)​

  • kubeserver automatically purge spitable logs (06a64977, Qiu Jian)
  • support risc-v (8aa6daf6, Qu Xuan)
  • update vendor 20240305 (3e20b373, Qiu Jian)
  • compability issues and add github test flow (685c53ad, Qiu Jian)
  • support build specific multi-arch buildx (470d6110, Qiu Jian)
  • cni: add --may-exist args (7b159292, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: https s3 endpoint of loki (b47d8166, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: registry repository name filter (b5773399, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: show more error details when adding helm repo (5a324a05, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: Not found namespace by cluster (2071c407, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: disable 3des cipher suites (d9a18a66, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: sync system-default cluster (00366f1b, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: url filter for container_registry models (cda26d21, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: list container registries (fa9d8302, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: repo url filter (f6a5b6b6, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: retry 5 mins to wait kube-apiserver running (8205542b, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: can't deploy k8s v1.22.9 (8d4a4d7f, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: skip HPA syncing (ace99bf7, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: update grafana version to 7.5.17 (33a030d7, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: can't import empty api_server cluster (88fd5aab, Zexi Li)
  • kubeserver: raise error when get client from imported kubeconfig (18814193, Zexi Li)
  • ocnet-cni: set container netif to eth%d (25ea27c6, Zexi Li)

  • backup: 备份失败时，删除以时间戳结尾的空备份路径 (c838ccb, Zhang Dongliang)
  • buildah: ubuntu matched pattern (31bc562, Zexi Li)
  • buildah: only use -e flag when buildah version gt 1.23 (6b2ad53, Zexi Li)
  • chart: victoriaMetrics csi definition (851fb38, Zexi Li)
  • chart: change ingress pathType to Prefix (1f45826, Zexi Li)
  • check: hostname check (a296c00, Zhang Dongliang)
  • comp: minor: 容错处理 (05537ce, Zhang Dongliang)
  • comp: minor: 容错处理02 (cb82c64, Zhang Dongliang)
  • compose: make apigateway depends on region (ff30fdd, Zexi Li)
  • compose: add cloudid service (be184fa, Zexi Li)
  • compose: update compose-service-init to v3.11-0530.0 (abbb482, Zexi Li)
  • compose: resolve conflict (3a15586, Zexi Li)
  • compose: update some service images to v3.10.5 (7677a73, Zexi Li)
  • conf: 通过iso安装时，tui界面未勾选enable host agent 选项，部署完成后不应该启用 host agent (c910cb0, Zhang Dongliang)
  • containerd: set state path to /opt/yunion/run/containerd (d1e6cc7, Zexi Li)
  • db,backup: db 自动备份中文locale hotfix (9137db0, Zhang Dongliang)
  • deploy,stack: stack选项相关改进 (3d986ad, Zhang Dongliang)
  • dockerfile: update dockerfile for ansible-base (97c1cda, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ha: loadBalancerEndpoint of onecloud cluster (98e7dd3, Zexi Li)
  • host,iso: iso 新增计算节点hotfix (982778c, Zhang Dongliang)
  • k3s: set image-gc-{low,hight}-threshold option (3d6f4cd, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: set CATTLE_NEW_SIGNED_CERT_EXPIRATION_DAYS to 3650 (a5b4c60, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: specify pause-image from image_repository (51f67c5, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: add-node hotfix (d8599f2, Zhang Dongliang)
  • k3s: 无文件和目录中文问题 (3a11a00, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: ignore errors when patch k3s calico-kube-controllers (9d994a8, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: patch addon deployments (828d6c9, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: traefik http redirection (55b99f2, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: disable traefik service (bccfdb5, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: install systemd service by is_k3s_server variable (ec3a2e6, Zexi Li)
  • k3s: set CATTLE_NEW_SIGNED_CERT_EXPIRATION_DAYS when upgrade (011a33f, Zexi Li)
  • k8s: add node host-networks options (90d2254, Zexi Li)
  • k8s: 解决sweet32 安全漏洞 (880cb2b, Zhang Dongliang)
  • kernel: install kernel 20230805 on centos7 x86 since 3.10 (3d583cd, Zhang Dongliang)
  • kernel-check: always reboot host node (3565763, wanyaoqi)
  • lbagent: 添加lbagent节点时debian系列不启动openvswitch服务 (cd42d4e, Zhang Dongliang)
  • misc,repo,bin: ocadm version check minor (6c2eacb, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ocboot: update operator image for k3s and use IMAGE_REPOSITORY env (7349b01, Zexi Li)
  • ocboot: add lbagent node when using k3s (5677fff, Zexi Li)
  • ocboot.sh: use buildah chroot isolation to reduce env requirements (526bafd, Zexi Li)
  • offline: default offline deploy task yaml file (8edbce3, Zhang Dongliang)
  • openeuler: openeuler iso offline (310fe2f, Zhang Dongliang)
  • openeuler-x86_64: add python3-libselinux package (e90b262, Zexi Li)
  • package: install latest climc-ee by default (6f6b5f1, Zhang Dongliang)
  • python3,rocky: install python3 on rocky8 to enable host (c49e67f, Zhang Dongliang)
  • reboot: 仅在安装yunion内核或配置大页内存时重启 (044f830, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ssh: 解决自动配置sshkey不生效的问题 (707d7b0, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ubuntu: ubunbu 22.04 arm64 兼容 (c72af21, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ubuntu: disable use DNSStubListener (75356ad, Zexi Li)
  • ubuntu: 更新ubuntu/debian软件名模式 (6be228d, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ubuntu: ovmf hotfix (0cfd049, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ubuntu: add node (4b9dbc5, Zexi Li)
  • upgrade: upgrade to 3.11 from 3.10 (6c21c44, Zhang Dongliang)
  • upgrade: 升级变量判断兼容 (314a2b7, Zhang Dongliang)
  • upgrade: offline upgrade issue (4a94aae, Zhang Dongliang)
  • upgrade: get cluster current imageRepository when no args provided (70d0b93, Zexi Li)
  • upgrade: sudo command for ssh execution (6cf5528, Zexi Li)
  • upgrade: 升级相关hotfix (b858c08, Zhang Dongliang)
  • upgrade,offline: 升级相关目录确保存在 (f541cef, Zhang Dongliang)
  • var: var test enhance (0a18c2e, Zhang Dongliang)
  • version: 3.11 版本升级到3.11.0 (0d10b8f, Zhang Dongliang)
  • version: 二进制版本检测容错 (5fc82da, Zhang Dongliang)
  • version: update version from 3.10.6 to 3.10.7 (8a3eb81, Zhang Dongliang)
  • version: 版本更新到v3.10.12 (c0e5a4a, Zhang Dongliang)
  • version: update version to v3.10.10 (0b24787, Zhang Dongliang)
  • version: update version from v3.10.5 to v3.10.6 (00c26d9, Zhang Dongliang)
  • version: version update from 3.10.7 3.10.8 (b76fd76, Zhang Dongliang)

Code Refactoring (3)​

  • move duplicated code to task (4a7016c, Zexi Li)
  • containerd: move lxcfs from ai-env and detect lxcfs_path (5090bea, Zexi Li)
  • ha: replace generate-ha-config.sh with python generator (f58fcd6, Zexi Li)

Feature (2)​

  • install yunion-qemu-10.0.7 for win11 (852214b, Qiu Jian)
  • add scripts to export and import docker multi-arch images (37b51ef, Qiu Jian)

Features (42)​

  • support containerd deployment (13ff613, Zexi Li)
  • release v3.11.9 (5461148, Zexi Li)
  • ipv6 support (70433c9, wanyaoqi)
  • ensure climc completion in ~/.bashrc (7296982, Zexi Li)
  • support openeuler 24.03 (7a7f90c, Zexi Li)
  • support ctyunos (e8ee3f3, Zexi Li)
  • support --pip-mirror/-m args when use run.py (383834f, Zexi Li)
  • update baremetal compose file to v3.11.6 (ecd2b6b, Zexi Li)
  • add clickhouse step (d3dff91, Zexi Li)
  • add generate-ha-config.sh script (e18426d, Zexi Li)
  • switch edition command (735b129, Zexi Li)
  • support host_networks and disk_paths option for add-node (35d3fe6, Zexi Li)
  • support specify region and zone for new cluster (3d67630, Zexi Li)
  • update version to v3.11.6 (bb34acb, Zexi Li)
  • use buildah to run ocboot.py (6f252fe, Zexi Li)
  • release v3.11.8 (5abfc7b, Zexi Li)
  • Parametrize image registry (de7f465, Olli Janatuinen)
  • add setup-ai-env command (36c996c, Zexi Li)
  • use k3s as cluster defaultly (28e3b0c, Zexi Li)
  • update baremetal compose file (7afc521, Zexi Li)
  • set version to v4.0.2 (061fc7a, Zexi Li)
  • update chart to v3.11.5 (2d103d8, Zexi Li)
  • make ip_conf optional when start run.py (f2211d2, Zexi Li)

  • generate baremetal compose file (6633599, Zexi Li)
  • update version to v3.11.4 (554ef9f, Zexi Li)
  • deploy to k3s (dce4cf9, Zexi Li)
  • ubuntu grub config support (7904f78, wanyaoqi)
  • ansible: 兼容ansible 2.16 (28fde33, Zhang Dongliang)
  • baremetal-compose: upgrade to v3.11.8 (2b23730, Zexi Li)
  • cloud: ocboot 默认开启火山引擎(从3.11) (9a36d99, Zhang Dongliang)
  • compose: update baremetal compose to use v3.11.5 (26b081c, Zexi Li)
  • compose: update to v3.11.5 (8a8ca31, Zexi Li)
  • dns: 新增自定义dns入口 (0e8ca7b, Zhang Dongliang)
  • docker-compose: add esxi-agent and host-deployer services (0539fed, Zexi Li)
  • gpu,upgrade: 升级过程默认不再重新初始化gpu (e7e4a48, Zhang Dongliang)
  • kylin: kylin sp3 comp (e2808b8, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ocboot: support LightEdge product version (669de79, Zexi Li)
  • os: comp for openeuler and uos fou (11a41a3, Zhang Dongliang)
  • os,centos: add support for centos 8 (f49faf5, Zhang Dongliang)

Hotfix (3)​

  • add lbagent allow 1c1g; refine add command (8bfa366, Zhang Dongliang)
  • 网络配置优化 (c718219, Zhang Dongliang)
  • ansible assert mark embedded variable unsafe (6829b1d, Zhang Dongliang)

  • ocboot.sh: enabling the aliasing for buildah in this shell (74b9a71, Yu Zhu)

sdnagent​

仓库地址: https://github.com/yunionio/sdnagent

39 commits to sdnagent - v4.0.2 since this release.

Bug Fixes (34)​

  • slow update tc (84a45afa, Qiu Jian)
  • support risc-v (3ff8a1a4, Qu Xuan)
  • vender update 4.0.2 (d146389a, 万垚奇)
  • Limit the range of zoneid to prevent overflow (1267b750, sayaoailun)
  • support build image for specific multi-archs buildx (64e5e716, Qiu Jian)
  • sdnagent build for default CPU arch (3638c517, Qiu Jian)
  • update vendor 4.0.2 20260121 (168b721e, Qiu Jian)
  • update vendor and update metadata service (5ec06fa1, Qiu Jian)
  • upgrade go 1.24 (1b57493e, Qu Xuan)
  • update vendor release/4.0.0 20250607 (816b783f, Qiu Jian)
  • ipv6 only compatibility fixes (c5139584, Qiu Jian)
  • vpc metadata server queue size zero (3c2decac, Qiu Jian)
  • update vendor master 20250716 (d49a2271, Qiu Jian)
  • ipv6 dhcpv6 support (b419431e, Qiu Jian)
  • update flows to catch ipv6 icmp6 pkts (4fec3521, Qiu Jian)
  • dhcpv6 support (2915c181, Qiu Jian)
  • docker_push updates (312cd18b, Qiu Jian)
  • flowman nil pointer panic (93b61ddd, Qiu Jian)
  • update vendor 20231029 (095f475a, Qiu Jian)
  • update vendor release/4.0 20250606 (36b8bf84, Qiu Jian)
  • disable arp learning between hostlocal ip (19d817b7, Qiu Jian)
  • update vendor 20231225 (e5d8ea7c, Qiu Jian)
  • notify may lost event (b2692cd8, Qiu Jian)
  • ipv6 nb package flow filter (2538ab51, Qiu Jian)
  • update vendor 3.11 (73238456, Qiu Jian)
  • container network flows (ee84c781, Qiu Jian)
  • classic network metadata server revisit (67832f6d, Qiu Jian)
  • host local net arp leak (776439a6, Qiu Jian)
  • arp response for metadata server (912609e9, Qiu Jian)
  • ovn encap cost (ed5a8f44, Qiu Jian)
  • eip: use the option SdnFetchDataFromComputeService (2753c622, Zexi Li)
  • sdnagent: add patch cmd (0428ce3f, Qu Xuan)
  • sdnagent: update sdnagent patch cmd (58ffd03d, Qu Xuan)
  • sdnagent: support sdnagent amd64 solo (6abbd92d, Qu Xuan)

Feature (3)​

  • support hostlocal wire (c9454dba, Qiu Jian)
  • support port mappings (d14717af, Qiu Jian)
  • ipv6 support (2cdd66e6, Qiu Jian)

Features (2)​

  • add guest nic dedicated secgroup support (714fb1a4, wanyaoqi)
  • use github workflows (9a6baac3, Zexi Li)
